entries.comment: the stitch reference is the whole idea — keep it literal

move.move: A geometric 'M' monogram constructed from a Coptic bookbinding stitch pattern
move.rationale: literal + systematic: the mark IS the craft, drawn on a grid so it holds at a favicon
move.expected_effect: ownable, trademark-clean, legible at every size

exemplar_evidence.why_cited: a publishing mark that is a constructed system, not a picture

move.move: Spare and considered — name the craft and the material, never the hype; lead with the made thing
move.rationale: institutional + functional restraint: gravitas through under-statement, the opposite of disposable-age noise
move.expected_effect: copy a stranger can extend without drifting into marketing-speak

entries.comment: first pass — felt too loud against the spare voice

move.move: A saturated jewel-tone palette, color-forward across every surface

entries.comment: this — restrained, with the one gold tell

move.move: Ink-black and cream as the system; a single foredge-gold accent used sparingly as the brand's 'tell'
move.rationale: expressive + restrained: one ownable color that coheres with the spare voice instead of fighting it
move.expected_effect: recognition through the gold detail; high contrast headroom for accessibility

move.move: A book-faced serif for display (the voice), a neutral grotesque workhorse for UI and specs
move.rationale: organic + expressive display carries the craft; a systematic workhorse keeps it operable
move.expected_effect: the page feels bound, not branded; specs stay legible

exemplar_evidence.why_cited: type that reads as a publication, not a product

move.move: Generous margins, a slow grid, product-true photography of the bound objects on cream — no stock, no campaign loudness
move.rationale: quiet + premium: the expression grammar is the restraint the color and voice already chose
move.expected_effect: the room reads as considered; new work is generated from the grid, not copied

exemplar_evidence.why_cited: quiet-premium expression as a generative grammar

move.move: A named brand steward + a one-page principles sheet; partner lockups require the steward's sign-off
move.rationale: organic + human-led: a small studio steward beats a heavy token system the team won't maintain
move.expected_effect: the brand survives contact with real work without a bureaucracy
